title: Come Together
description: Exploring personal growth and love and relationships.
lyrics: Yeah, you know I'm coming clear It takes more It takes more That's when it's for me That's when it's for me Take a chance, balance that That's when it's for me, baby That's when it's for you, ooh You do, you do, you do, baby And that's when it's for you We can come together, yeah That's when it's for me, baby Our time, our love That's when it's for me, baby Spinning and blowin' Let's just come together, oh What when we come together? Every day That's when it's for me, baby All the time I think about you That's when it's for you, baby Everything you do to you That's when it's for you, baby Can't you understand the mirror Reflections, it's clearer That's when it's for you, baby Every day That's when it's for me, baby All the time I think about you That's when it's for you, baby Everything you do to you That's when it's for you, baby Can't you understand the mirror Reflections, it's clearer  Every night you know we're feelin' that flow That hot, sip, that rose When the streets grow, where'd you go? Yeah, love, new in a row That's when it's for me, baby From me, you, to you, baby Do we need to reach out and touch? No, we don't stay where we are There's no tellin' where we're goin' Don't let the me grow up All the ego's for me, baby Erase what you know That's when it's for me, baby That's when it's for you, baby Everything you do to you That's when it's for me, baby That's when it's for me, baby Come together Treat everyone Everything Respect Basic principles of livin' without Come together Don't regret your whole time here Love yourself Fuck that bullshit you're doin' out there To yourselves It's probably not very popular Stop fuckin' playin' Shit, like, write it down Quit bullshittin' Remember that shit Take care of your motherfuckin' family All day, all day, all day Act like a little motherfuckin' bitch Woo, cock Shit Motherfucker Talk about wearin' and losin' Quit playin', get the fuck outta here Shit This one's for me, to you For me, for you From me to you Come together Just come together Baby, come up Come together
